files.contents:
Flashcard App

Static hosting is working. Visit /health for a JSON health check.

# Flashcard App — Base Express Setup

Minimal Express server foundation for the Flashcard app.

Run locally:

1) Install dependencies
   npm install

2) Start in dev mode (auto-restarts on changes)
   npm run dev

3) Or start normally
   npm start

Server will listen on:
http://localhost:7995

Endpoints:
- GET /health -> 200 { "status": "ok" }
- Static files served from ./public (open / in browser)

Testing:
- Run tests: npm test

notes: Start the server with npm run dev and visit http://localhost:7995/health to verify a 200 response.
Static files are served from the public/ directory; public/index.html is included.
Tests use Jest and Supertest; run with npm test.
